params.name: Godfather's Pipe
params.description: A handcrafted briar wood pipe, finely polished to present a deep brown luster, with a warm and delicate touch. The pipe's stem is slightly heavy, providing a stable grip. Through this pipe, one can almost see that unfathomable figure and the empire of the mafia behind him...
